zh.lifeSummary: 當Gérard Ier de Vaudémont於大約1057年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，他的父親Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz39歲，母親Hadwide de  Namur34歲。他於1088年與Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1108年在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年52歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯貝爾瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gérard Ier de Vaudémont于大约1057年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特时，他的父亲Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz39岁，母亲Hadwide de  Namur34岁。他于1088年与Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1108年在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年52岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯貝爾瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gérard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Gérard Ier de Vaudémont was born about 1057, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, was 39 and his mother, Hadwide de  Namur, was 34. He married Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg in 1088, in Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1108, in Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 52, and was buried in Belval, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gérard Ier de Vaudémont est né environ 1057, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Hadwide de  Namur, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg en 1088, à Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1108, à Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Belval, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gérard Ier de Vaudémont um 1057 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz 39 und seine Mutter Hadwide de  Namur 34. Er hat 1088 in Heiliges Römisches Reich Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1108 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Heiliges Römisches Reich und wurde in Belval, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard Ier de Vaudémont è nato il circa 1057 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Hadwide de  Namur, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg nel 1088, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1108, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Belval, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gérard Ier de Vaudémontが約1057年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metzは39歳，母Hadwide de  Namurは34歳であった。1088年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチでHeilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1108年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで52歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスベルヴァルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gérard Ier de Vaudémont(이)가 대략 1057년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadwide de  Namur(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1088년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1108년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 벨발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard Ier de Vaudémont nasceu aproximadamente 1057, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Hadwide de  Namur, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg em 1088, em Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1108, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Belval, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gérard Ier de Vaudémont родился около 1057 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadwide de  Namur, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg в 1088 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1108 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности белваль, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gérard Ier de Vaudémont nació aproximadamente 1057, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Gérard Ier de Lorraine comte de Metz, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Hadwide de  Namur, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Heilwig von Egisheim-Dagsburg en 1088, en Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1108, en Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Belval, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
